Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
[Your Name]

follow_up_email.subject: Next Steps: Deploying Research Agent to Main Domain
follow_up_email.body:
Hi Amber,

Thank you for your time today and for walking through the research agent demo with me. As discussed, the research agent requires deployment on the main domain (thermostat.ai) to function properly, as it cannot operate on localhost.

Our next step will be to deploy the agent to the main domain. Once this is complete, I will reach out to confirm everything is working as expected and to address any additional questions you may have.

If you have any further details about your company profile or specific requirements, please let me know so we can ensure the deployment aligns with your needs.

Best regards,
Aman Gulani

Hi Victor,

Thank you for taking the time to speak with me earlier. I apologize for any confusion during our call. I would like to ensure that I am reaching the right person and provide you with information relevant to your business needs.

Could you please confirm if you are the main contact for [Company Name], or if there is someone else I should connect with? Additionally, I would appreciate learning more about your current priorities and how we might be able to assist.

Looking forward to your response.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

company_profile.name: Brian Tracy International
company_profile.description: Brian Tracy International provides sales training programs, motivational speaking, and personal development resources focused on sales strategies, leadership, and success principles. Founded by renowned author and speaker Brian Tracy, the company offers books, online courses, seminars, and consulting to help individuals and organizations improve sales performance and achieve goals.
key_products: Books such as 'The Psychology of Selling'
Online courses on sales success and prospecting

funding.total_raised: Not publicly disclosed (self-funded or bootstrapped by founder)
funding.financial_health: Stable; operates as an established brand with ongoing revenue from training programs, book sales, and speaking engagements. No recent signs of financial distress.

tech_stack.technologies: WordPress for website, online learning platforms (e.g., Thinkific or similar LMS), email marketing tools (e.g., Mailchimp), Zoom for virtual training
tech_stack.infrastructure: Cloud-based hosting, CRM systems for sales leads
tech_stack.tools: Sales enablement software, video conferencing, digital course delivery platforms

recent_news: Continued promotion of sales training resources, with blog updates on prospecting tips and sales strategies as of recent years.
Brian Tracy remains active in content creation, including summaries of his books like 'The Psychology of Selling' shared across platforms.
No major acquisitions, pivots, or funding announcements in 2025-2026; focus on evergreen sales education content.
pitch_angles: Leverage expertise in sales psychology to complement their training programs with AI-powered sales tools for prospecting and call analysis.
Enhance their online courses with real-time transcription and insight extraction from sales calls, addressing speech-to-text errors.
Position as a partner for scaling virtual sales training with automated rapport-building and objection-handling AI.
Target their audience of salespeople with tools that implement Brian Tracy's 80/20 rule and emotional needs framework.
pain_points: Manual prospecting and lead qualification in a competitive training market.
Dependence on live calls and webinars, where speech-to-text errors could hinder post-call analysis.
Scaling personalized sales coaching for global audiences without advanced tech automation.
Keeping content fresh amid evolving sales tactics like AI-driven personalization.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

key_points: Prospect asked for the caller's phone number.
Prospect indicated they wanted to check something before starting.
pain_points: Prospect may be uncertain about the caller's identity or legitimacy.
Lack of readiness or willingness to proceed with the call at this time.
next_steps: Follow up with an introductory email including full contact information and company background.
Offer to schedule a call at the prospect's convenience.
Clarify the purpose of the outreach and provide value proposition upfront.

positive_signals: Prospect did not immediately reject the call.
negative_signals: Prospect did not engage in discussion.
No information exchanged about needs or interest.
risk_factors: Prospect may be screening calls for legitimacy.
Lack of engagement or willingness to proceed.

follow_up_email.subject: Following Up: Introduction and Contact Information
follow_up_email.body:
Hi,

Thank you for taking my call earlier. I wanted to follow up and provide my direct contact information as well as a brief introduction to our company, Aetheryx AI. We help businesses like yours [insert value proposition or relevant benefit].

If you have any questions or would like to schedule a brief call at your convenience, please let me know. I’m happy to provide any additional information you need.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]
Aetheryx AI

key_points: Sales representative initiated the call with a greeting.
pain_points: Unable to connect with client or gather any information.

follow_up_email.subject: Following Up on Our Recent Call Attempt
follow_up_email.body:
Hello,

I recently tried to reach you by phone but was unable to connect. I’d like to ensure we have the opportunity to discuss how we can support your needs. Please let me know a convenient time for you, or feel free to reply to this email with your availability.

Looking forward to connecting soon.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
